entries.gt_d38700c7f0ec5e: Circuit's wet. Don't touch the panel.
entries.gt_d4ee4265cc827f: Feels like they opened me up...
entries.gt_d6058c37f5fe02: Pipe's sweating salt. The pipefitter will curse.
entries.gt_d646a01fec7c46: Key rack's empty. But every door is locked.
entries.gt_d653c71265ef35: Breathe through your sleeve and keep quiet!
entries.gt_d6f232d733570d: Latch is on, key out of the keyhole!
entries.gt_d7999eeb1b5ed4: Right, caught our breath and onward.
entries.gt_d7dccacafc0597: The tile is cold in a circle. Don't step there.
entries.gt_d8f1ffc35fd99e: Mop by the door is dry. Means the puddle is new.
entries.gt_d9f60ceae37df2: Floor's soft under the linoleum. Go around this spot.
entries.gt_dad8e8c0f22157: The sign's cold? Wrap it in a rag and don't argue in front of everyone.
entries.gt_db347441dda5f5: Bullet under the table. Either forgotten or bait.
entries.gt_dbd079d845d3e6: You're not in the way anymore.
entries.gt_dc0f7082bf7839: Block the passage with a stool!
entries.gt_dcf90e93a46811: Dead midges under the lamp. Bad light.
entries.gt_dda47e282b39e3: Chair turned toward the wall. Someone was listening to the plaster.
entries.gt_e046b969874e81: Didn't live to the next siren.
entries.gt_e0545c5224e580: Don't let yourselves get pinned in the passage!
entries.gt_e0e76ae8592d8d: While we're alive, we sit quiet.
entries.gt_e243212f09644a: It hurts so bad I'm sick...
entries.gt_e31726739687aa: This isn't a fight anymore, it's a slaughter!
entries.gt_e3d8d72eacc204: Right, what have we got here.
entries.gt_e463dec33507a8: Made it without bites. That's rare.
entries.gt_e4d4cfb31242d6: A room's a room, as long as nothing crawls out.
entries.gt_e79d10c7b589b6: Fewer spoons in the kitchen. They're eating fast today.
entries.gt_e7c2173ecc5587: Pot's empty but warm. Someone left recently.
entries.gt_e9dbc84bfba824: Threshold creaks. Someone worked under it.
entries.gt_e9fc1791fd5bc1: Coupon's wet. Dry it in your sleeve, not by the lamp.
entries.gt_ea1a597b67fc54: You hear the siren, you get inside fast!
entries.gt_ea36dd98dd4315: Elevator smells of ozone. Walking will be faster.
entries.gt_ea79abc3576a11: The concrete-turners plastered over the passage. Now it's kitchen detour only.
entries.gt_eb2b50e51291e8: Move the cabinet to the door!
entries.gt_eb7729515ff768: Hatch cover's warm. Don't step in the middle.
entries.gt_ec575ce493b48d: Don't slow down, it'll catch up!
entries.gt_ecf93d64c2e55e: Chair sideways by the door. Someone sat ready.
entries.gt_ef99c1ffce59ff: Don't crawl under the bed, it won't save you!
entries.gt_f12607b0a7f74d: Fresh bleach smell. Someone washed a trace away.
entries.gt_f292ce70823318: Shelf sagged. Don't pull the top drawer.
entries.gt_f3536ae3953aac: Get him away from the passage.
entries.gt_f3a9b3cea88ea0: Listening to borscht-mancers is funny until the kitchen poisons the queue.
entries.gt_f7281c93573591: It's coming through the cracks now!
entries.gt_f8016b28848cd2: Run while your legs still work!
entries.gt_f93f7bdd14ed9c: Face to the floor and quiet!
entries.gt_fa850791ab793d: Hermodoor clicked early. Count your way back.
entries.gt_fac0b89c389a3d: Bandage drying on the radiator. Don't ask whose.
entries.gt_fbdce9075ac593: That's the end of his route.
entries.gt_fd0307ed99876c: Don't open if they speak behind the door in your voice.
entries.gt_fd6f0fbfbebacb: That's the end of the route.
entries.gt_ff8b1cff5b9b64: Leave bread by the radiator. The hungry one will find it and remember.
